first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both award the same score (3/10) and base their reasoning on the same critical gap: a complete lack of experience in the core competencies of the role (experimentation, A/B testing, growth engineering). The minor differences in wording and emphasis are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in the candidate's location from Berlin to São Paulo.
